--- layout: empty title: "Image Selector — Click-to-Pick Pattern" permalink: /image-selector description: "A reusable browser-only UI for picking winners from AI-generated image batches. Click cells to mark picks, localStorage persists, JSON-copy at the end. Pre-loaded with Igor's 7 Habits raccoon set." --- Image Selector — Pick your 7 Habits raccoon

Pick your 7 Habits raccoon

Click any cell to mark the variation PICKED. Click again to toggle off. Picks persist across refresh via localStorage (key image-choice-picks). Use the Copy JSON button at the bottom to grab the selection as { row_slug: letter }.

This page is loaded with the v4 raccoon batch for Stephen Covey's 7 Habits of Highly Effective People — 7 habits × 5 variations each. Pink NEW badges flag the d/e cells added in the most recent round so re-reviewers can scan only fresh candidates.

Fork your own: generic template gist — drop your own ROWS array, point src at your images, open in a browser. Lessons from the build: see the AI journal.
